# Shared-file drift allow-list  (a11oy <-> killinchu)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read by .github/shared-file-drift-check.py. One path per line; text after a
# `#` is ignored, so each path may carry an inline reason. KEEP THIS FILE
# IDENTICAL IN BOTH REPOS.
#
# A path here is a file that BOTH repos ship and that the guard would otherwise
# require to be byte-identical, but which is *currently* allowed to differ. The
# guard is a ratchet:
#   * Files NOT listed here must stay byte-identical across the two repos, or the
#     build FAILS (this blocks NEW drift).
#   * Files listed here are reported but do not fail the build.
#   * When a listed file becomes identical again, the guard WARNS so this entry
#     can be removed — tightening the ratchet over time.
#
# To accept a deliberate divergence: add the path with a short reason.
# To reconcile a divergence: sync the file in both repos, then delete its line.
#
# Seeded 2026-06-08 with the drift that existed when the guard was added.
# 2026-06-09 reconciliation pass: szl_rag.py and szl_khipu_lmdb.py were synced to
# a single canonical copy in BOTH repos and removed from this list. The remaining
# entries are GENUINE, intentional app-specific divergences (one-line reason each)
# kept on purpose — the two demos are NOT meant to be byte-identical here, so they
# are documented rather than force-synced.

# --- Organ-naming consolidation: a11oy uses the new Operator/Policy/Reasoning
#     vocabulary; killinchu still uses the legacy Rosie/Sentra/Amaru codenames.
#     A staged, multi-repo rename across live cosign-signed organs — do NOT
#     blind-sync; reconcile only when the whole consolidation lands in both.
szl_alloy_models.py        # operator_mirrored (a11oy) vs rosie_mirrored (killinchu)
szl_llm_registry.py        # Operator/Policy/Reasoning (a11oy) vs Rosie/Sentra/Amaru (killinchu)

# --- App-specific feature sets: each demo ships features the other does not.
a11oy_code_engine.py       # a11oy-only HF-router roster + multi-name token detection for the Code tab
operator_shell_v4.py       # killinchu-only POST /inbox drone-telemetry handler (P2 spec)
live_wires_3d.js           # killinchu-only SISTER_LABELS honest organ-name render layer
szl_khipu_consensus.py     # killinchu-only honest theorem-provenance / lake_receipt on consensus payloads
szl_evidence_research.py   # killinchu-only finance/real-estate/risk vertical CLAIMS (PR #115) absent from a11oy's organ console

# --- Doctrine / honesty-claim state that differs per demo.
# 2026-06-10: szl_brain.py and szl_formulas.py were union-merged to a single
#   canonical byte-identical copy in BOTH repos tonight, so they are removed from
#   this list to tighten the ratchet (they are now ENFORCED identical).
szl_provenance.py          # SLSA self-assessment note differs (a11oy L1-honest vs killinchu L2)

# --- Vendored binary-asset blob bundle: each demo vendors a different set of
#     fonts / 3D / chart assets as base64 blobs, so this file legitimately
#     differs (a11oy ~1.52MB vs killinchu ~1.30MB). NOT a shared logic module.
_vendor_blobs.py           # per-app vendored asset blob bundle (different asset sets)

# --- Server execution model differs.
szl_live_wires.py          # a11oy async (await asyncio.sleep) vs killinchu blocking (time.sleep)

# --- App-specific landing + server: the two demos have distinct hero landing
#     pages and distinct FastAPI servers (different routes/tabs/3D). NOT meant to
#     be byte-identical — each is the front door of a different product surface.
cathedral.html             # a11oy Sovereign-Lattice hero vs killinchu maritime/C2 hero
serve.py                   # a11oy console+verticals server vs killinchu /elite drone-C2 server

# --- 2026-06-14: killinchu QA5 demo-floor rate-limit fix. killinchu exempts
#     its own page/static routes (/elite, /maritime, /globe, /jackin, ...) from
#     the per-IP limiter so the showcase always renders; a11oy serves different
#     routes, so this hardening module is intentionally app-specific. Reconcile
#     only if both demos ever adopt one shared limiter.
szl_be_hardening.py        # killinchu QA5 page/static rate-limit exemptions (app-specific routes)
